name: Pasta with Roasted Vegetables and Balsamic Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine scallions, bell pepper, zucchini, tomatoes, garlic, balsamic vinegar, and olive oil in a shallow baking dish. Bake at 400°F for about 30 minutes (stirring once), or until vegetables are tender.
2. Cook pasta in boiling water according to package directions. Drain hot cooked pasta and toss with vegetables, and serve.
